notes: Compound noun: Luft (air) + Reiniger (cleaner/purifier). The plural form is identical to the singular.

sentences.german: Der Luftreiniger entfernt Staub und Pollen aus der Luft.
sentences.english: The air purifier removes dust and pollen from the air.

sentences.german: In vielen Büros stehen heutzutage Luftreiniger, um die Luftqualität zu verbessern.
sentences.english: Nowadays, air purifiers are found in many offices to improve air quality.
